target_audience: A first-time buyer evaluating whether AOF is credible and worth further discussion.
expected_blocking_standard: The artifact must explain what AOF is for in plain, concrete buyer language.
The artifact must establish trust with evidence instead of self-assertion.
The artifact must make the offer, problem, and differentiation understandable on first read.
known_weaknesses: No concrete audience framing beyond generic business language.
No proof, examples, or measurable evidence.
No credible pricing logic or call to action.
No explanation of why a buyer should trust the system now.
benchmark_expectation: A strong review should block this artifact, explain why a first-time buyer would reject it, and propose organization or loop changes rather than only line edits.
